dropped_reason: high run-to-run variance + intermittent token-overrun (2026-05-08 fires: S0=0.6→0.2 within 1 hour)

strictly dominated by deepseek-v4-flash via alibaba (DashScope) at identical model + identical pricing: M7=39263ms/1Kw vs alibaba's 9830ms/1Kw (~4x slower). Quality identical. 2026-05-10T12:29 cross-provider trial confirmed; keep dropped record as audit trail of the comparison.

M5 (body_emit_set_coverage) = 0.111 in post-#60 regression scorecard (2026-05-10T12:08): declares concept_slugs but barely integrates them via cross-page wikilinks (KB-graph value degraded). The pre-#59 reading of M5=1.000 was the tautological-by-construction artifact; the new measure surfaces real model behavior. Excellent cost+latency don't compensate for this quality gap on the canonical corpus.

Strictly dominated by deepseek-v4-flash:direct (DeepSeek native API at https://api.deepseek.com) on the canonical corpus (2026-05-23). The 2026-05-14 6/6 JSON-gate failures (character-level malformation, leaked </think> tags) and the #63.7-A4 live-compile failure on the Buffett source were caused by Alibaba's OpenAI-compatibility layer stripping or mis-routing 'response_format' for non-Qwen models, NOT a capability gap in deepseek-v4-flash itself (corrected diagnosis 2026-05-23, overturning the 2026-05-15 reasoning). Empirical proof: direct-route fire returned S0=1.000, M1-M5=1.000, M7=3578ms (2.75x faster than this entry's best historical 9830ms). The qwen3.6-flash 'control' on 2026-05-15 was misframed: it only proved Alibaba's native Qwen model survived its own routing, not that all models survive the compat layer. Keep dropped as audit trail of the routing-vs-capability investigation.

Strictly dominated by deepseek-v4-flash:direct on the canonical corpus (2026-05-23): identical quality measures (S0/M1-M5=1.000 both), but Pro is 3.2x more expensive ($0.0019 vs $0.0006/1Kw) and 2.7x slower (9760ms vs 3578ms/1Kw). DeepSeek's pricing page indicates the 75% discount ends 2026-05-31 with the post-discount rate set to '1/4 of the original price' = $0.435/$0.87 per 1M tokens, i.e. the discounted rate continues permanently under a re-labeled tier (cross-verified by user). Dominance is structural, not promo-bounded. The +17% pages_per_1k delta is not currently a scored quality dimension.
